justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly identified and offered a slot for the user's requested time of "around 4 PM" on June 3rd.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently processed the request in two turns, confirming and booking the appointment without any unnecessary questions or redundant API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent quickly understanding the user's request and confirming the booking.
